text:
Once upon an old time lived a squirrel. Every day she'd fly down from the tree and hop quietly amongst humans. They didn't know she was sentient. Perhaps she knew them. They liked her. They loved her.


They put her on a platform. You put her on. She didn't know how. That wasn't her job. She didn't know how. She was surprised. That wasn't right.



Some humans didn't know the first thing about kindness.





That's not what this does.
